data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the tests with the `Category=Integration` trait in this xUnit project. Let me look at the project files to understand the setup, then run the filtered tests.

toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-cdf8dec242114defacd8a64a14f57d72 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-build 2>&1 || dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" 2>&1", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 60}
